mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbound_message ( session_key, source, content, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionKey}, #{source}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_key, source, content, status, created_at FROM tgai.outbound_message WHERE session_key = #{sessionKey} AND status in ('COMPLETED', 'PROGRESS', 'FAILED') AND source = 'web' ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
